record.field: How long does ERP implementation take?
Implementation time varies depending on business size, but typically ranges from a few weeks to a few months.
Can the ERP integrate with my existing tools?
Yes, our ERP supports integrations with major third-party applications.
Do you provide training?
Absolutely! We provide hands-on training and continuous support to your team.
What are CRM Solutions?

CRM solutions are software systems designed to help businesses manage customer relationships, sales processes, and communication from a centralized platform. By organizing customer data, tracking leads and opportunities, and automating sales activities, CRM solutions help businesses improve customer engagement, increase sales efficiency, and build long-term customer relationships.
Why does my business need CRM Services?

CRM Services help businesses to manage customer interactions more efficiently by centralizing customer information, automating sales processes, and improving communication between teams. This leads to better customer experiences and improved sales performance.
How long does CRM implementation take?

The implementation timeline depends on the complexity of the project, required customization, integrations, and data migration. Small CRM projects may take a few weeks, while larger implementations can take several months.
How much does CRM implementation cost?

CRM implementation costs vary based on business size, customization, integrations, and training requirements. Costs may include setup, data migration, integration, and user training in addition to the CRM software subscription.
Can CRM be customized for my business processes?
Yes, CRM systems can be customized with custom fields, workflows, dashboards, and automation rules to match your business processes and reporting needs.
Can CRM integrate with other business tools?
Yes, CRM systems can integrate with tools such as ERP systems, marketing platforms, email services, accounting software, and customer support systems to create a connected business workflow.
How do you migrate data into a CRM system?
During CRM implementation, existing customer data from spreadsheets, legacy systems, or other software is cleaned, mapped, and securely migrated into the CRM to ensure accuracy and consistency.
Do you provide CRM support after implementation?
Yes, CRM support includes system maintenance, troubleshooting, updates, and continuous optimization to ensure the CRM platform continues to deliver value to the business.
What is a POS Solution?

A POS solution is a combination of software and hardware that allows businesses to process sales and streamline daily operations. It acts as the central hub where transactions happen and business data is recorded in real time.
Why POS Solutions?

POS (Point of Sale) solutions are essential for businesses to Simplify sales operations, improve efficiency, and enhance customer experience. They automate billing, track inventory in real time, and manage customer data from a single system, reducing manual work and errors. With a POS solution, businesses can process transactions faster, accept multiple payment methods, and gain valuable insights through detailed sales reports and analytics.
Do you sell or support POS hardware?

No. Creyox is a software and services company only. We deliver 100% Odoo-based POS software, configuration, integration, and ongoing support. We do not sell, supply, or repair any hardware. You can independently source your preferred devices and we will configure the Odoo POS software to work with them.
Can your POS software integrate with my inventory and accounting system?

Yes. Our POS integration solutions are built on Odoo, which natively connects POS with inventory, accounting, CRM, and e-commerce. If you use a third-party system, our POS software integration services bridge the gap via Odoo's API framework with no manual data entry required.
Do you offer POS solutions for small businesses?

Absolutely. We have dedicated Odoo POS packages for single-store and growing businesses, affordable cloud plans, simplified onboarding, and the full software feature set without an enterprise price tag. Many clients start small and scale to multiple locations on the same Odoo setup.
What does your POS setup and configuration service include?

Our POS setup service covers the complete Odoo POS software configuration product and category setup, pricing rules, tax configuration, payment method setup, user roles, session settings, and staff software training. We also provide post-go-live support to ensure smooth adoption.
Does Odoo POS work without an internet connection?

Yes. Odoo POS includes a built-in offline mode in the software. Transactions are stored locally in the browser session and automatically synchronised to the cloud when your connection returns. You never lose a sale due to a network outage
Can I manage multiple store locations from one Odoo POS system?

Yes. Our cloud POS solutions let you monitor sales, inventory, and staff across all locations from a single Odoo dashboard. Each location can have its own software configuration, separate pricing, products, tax rules, and user roles all managed centrally.
What makes you different from a regular web development company?

We are an Odoo certified partner not a generic web agency. Every website we build is developed on the Odoo framework, which means it connects natively to your CRM, inventory, accounting, and marketing. You get a business platform, not just a website.
Do you only build websites on Odoo, or do you work with other platforms?
Our primary expertise and strongest offering is Odoo website development. We specialise in Odoo because it delivers capabilities no other CMS can match for businesses already on or moving to Odoo.
What is included in your Odoo eCommerce website development service?

Our Odoo eCommerce development service covers full store design and configuration, product catalogue setup, payment gateway integration, inventory sync, checkout flow, shipping configuration, and post-launch support. Every eCommerce project includes full testing across devices before go-live.
Can you migrate our existing website or online store to Odoo?

Yes. We provide full migration services from platforms like WordPress, Shopify, WooCommerce, and Magento to Odoo website and eCommerce. This includes product and customer data migration, URL redirect mapping for SEO preservation, and full testing before the new site goes live.
How long does an Odoo website development project take?

A standard Odoo corporate website typically goes live in 3 to 4 weeks. An Odoo eCommerce development project with custom features typically takes 4 to 8 weeks depending on the product catalogue size and integration requirements. We provide a clear project timeline during the discovery phase.
Do you provide responsive websites?
Yes, all websites are fully responsive and mobile-friendly.
Will my Odoo website work on mobile devices?

Yes. Every website we develop is fully responsive designed and tested to perform correctly on desktop, tablet, and smartphone. Odoo's website builder is mobile-first by default, and we validate across real devices before launch.
Do you provide website maintenance after launch?

Yes. Our website development team offers post-launch maintenance like Odoo version updates, content changes, new page development, performance monitoring, security patches, and SEO health checks on an ongoing basis.
Do you provide ongoing support?
Yes, our team provides maintenance, updates, and performance monitoring.
What is Odoo integration?

Odoo integration refers to connecting the Odoo ERP platform with external systems, applications, and tools such as eCommerce stores, payment gateways, CRM platforms, logistics providers, and analytics tools so that data flows automatically between them without manual intervention.
Can you integrate Odoo with any platform?

In most cases, yes. If the platform has an open API REST, SOAP, or GraphQL we can integrate it with Odoo. For platforms without standard APIs, we assess custom middleware or file-based integration options during the discovery phase.
How long does an Odoo integration project take?

Pre-built connector deployments typically take 1–2 weeks. Custom Odoo API integration projects range from 3–8 weeks depending on complexity, the number of data flows, and testing requirements. We provide a clear timeline after the discovery phase.
Do you have pre-built integration connectors?

Yes. We have production-ready Odoo integration connectors for 3CX, TikTok Shop, Power BI, Google Sheets, Brevo, BigQuery, and more all available in the Odoo App Store under Creyox Technologies. These significantly reduce deployment time and cost.
Is our data secure during integration?

Absolutely. Every integration we build uses encrypted data transfer (HTTPS/TLS), proper API authentication (OAuth, API keys, tokens), and structured error handling so your data is always protected in transit and at rest.
Can you integrate Odoo with our legacy or custom system?

Yes. We specialise in bridging Odoo with legacy ERPs, custom-built platforms, and bespoke systems using middleware, custom APIs, or file-based data exchange depending on what your existing system supports.
Do you provide support after the integration goes live?

Yes. We offer dedicated post-launch support packages covering API update management, performance monitoring, error resolution, and connector maintenance so your integrations stay stable as platforms evolve and update their APIs.
Can you integrate Odoo with our eCommerce store?

Yes. We integrate Odoo with Shopify, WooCommerce, Magento, Amazon, eBay, TikTok Shop, and other commerce platforms syncing products, orders, inventory, customers, and returns in real time across all channels.
What is Odoo implementation?
Odoo implementation is the process of deploying and configuring the Odoo ERP platform to match your business workflows covering setup, customization, data migration, training, and support.
How long does the Odoo implementation process take?
Timelines vary by project scope. A small business implementation can take 4–8 weeks; mid-market projects typically run 3–5 months; complex enterprise rollouts may extend to 6–12 months.
Do you provide post-implementation support?
Yes. We offer structured post-go-live support plans covering monitoring, bug fixes, user queries, and regular system optimization.
Can you migrate data from our existing system?
Absolutely. We handle migration from any legacy ERP, accounting software, spreadsheets, or databases with full data validation and integrity checks.
Is Odoo implementation suitable for small businesses?
Yes. Odoo is particularly well-suited for small and growing businesses. We help small teams implement just what they need, with room to scale.
What makes Creyox different from other Odoo implementation companies?
We take a consultative, business-first approach. We don't just deploy software, we invest in understanding your operations and building an ERP that genuinely improves them.
What is Odoo customization?

Odoo customization is the process of modifying or extending the Odoo ERP platform beyond its standard features to match your specific business workflows. This includes building new custom modules, modifying existing ones, integrating Odoo with third-party systems, automating workflows, redesigning the UI, and creating custom reports all tailored to how your business actually operates.
How is Odoo customization different from Odoo configuration?

Configuration uses Odoo's built-in settings and tools to adjust the system without writing code things like adding stages, setting up user roles, or enabling features. Customization requires writing code to add functionality that Odoo doesn't offer by default. We help you identify which approach is right for each of your requirements and we always recommend configuration when it's sufficient.
Will my Odoo customizations break when Odoo upgrades to a new version?

They won't if they're built correctly. At Creyox, we use inheritance-based development and follow Odoo's official coding guidelines. This means your customizations are modular and separate from Odoo's core, they don't get overwritten during version upgrades. We also offer version migration services to move your custom code forward when upgrading from v14/v15/v16 to v17 or v18.
Can you integrate Odoo with the tools and platforms we already use?

Yes. We build integrations between Odoo and payment gateways (Razorpay, PayU, Stripe), e-commerce platforms (Shopify, Magento, WooCommerce), logistics providers (Delhivery, Shiprocket, FedEx), WhatsApp Business API, GST e-invoice and e-waybill portals, banking APIs, and any external system with a REST or JSON API. If your tool has an API we can connect it to Odoo.
Do you work with Odoo Community or only Odoo Enterprise?

We work with both. Odoo Community is the free, open-source edition and is fully customizable via code. Odoo Enterprise includes additional built-in features and Odoo Studio for no-code modifications. Our recommendation on which edition suits your business depends on your size, requirements, and budget and we'll advise honestly during the discovery consultation.
What Odoo versions do you work with?

We work with Odoo v14, v15, v16, v17, and v18. We recommend new projects be built on the latest stable version. For clients on older versions, we provide both ongoing support and upgrade/migration services.
Can I see progress during the development or do I just wait until the end?

You see progress throughout. We work in iterative sprints, with a demo and review session at the end of each sprint. You review working functionality as it's built and give feedback in real time. You're never waiting 6 weeks to see the result for the first time.
What happens after the customization is delivered?
We don't disappear after delivery. We offer post-delivery support that covers bug fixes, performance issues, and user questions. We also offer ongoing development retainer plans for businesses.
What is Odoo migration?

Odoo migration is the process of moving your existing Odoo system, its database, custom modules, configurations, and integrations to a newer version or a different environment. It can mean upgrading from Odoo v14 to v17, migrating data from Tally or SAP into Odoo, or moving your on-premise Odoo to the cloud.
What is the difference between Odoo migration and Odoo upgrade?

These terms are often used interchangeably, but they refer to slightly different things. An upgrade specifically refers to moving from one Odoo version to a newer one. Migration is a broader term that includes version upgrades, data migration from other systems, cloud migration, and database consolidation. All upgrades are migrations, but not all migrations are version upgrades.
Will my custom modules work after migration to the new version?

Not automatically but they will after we port them. Custom Odoo modules need to be reviewed and refactored for the new version's APIs and framework. Our dedicated module porting process ensures every custom module is analyzed, updated, tested, and fully functional in the new environment before go-live.
How long does Odoo migration take?

The timeline depends on the complexity of your system. A straightforward Odoo v15 → v17 upgrade with minimal customization can be completed in 3–4 weeks. A heavily customized system migrating from v12 → v18 may take 8–12 weeks. Data migration from a legacy ERP typically takes 4–8 weeks. We provide a detailed timeline after the free assessment.
Will there be any downtime during the Odoo migration?

We minimize downtime to the absolute minimum, typically 4–6 hours during the production cutover, which we schedule during your business's lowest-traffic period. The migration is fully tested on staging before the cutover, so the production window is a controlled execution, not an experiment.
Can you migrate from Tally, SAP, or QuickBooks to Odoo?

Yes. We handle data migration from Tally ERP, SAP Business One, QuickBooks, Zoho Books, Microsoft Dynamics, Busy Accounting, Marg ERP, and custom legacy systems. We extract your data, clean and map it to Odoo's structure, migrate it to a staging environment for validation, and only push to production after your team confirms everything is correct.
What is Odoo data migration?

Odoo data migration is the process of transferring business data from an external system into Odoo. This includes master data (customers, vendors, products) and transactional data all mapped, cleaned, and validated to ensure accuracy and completeness in the new system.
What is Odoo module migration?

Odoo module migration is the process of updating your custom Odoo modules to work with a newer Odoo version. It involves reviewing deprecated APIs, refactoring Python and JavaScript code, updating XML views, and testing all functionality in the new environment. It is a critical part of any Odoo version upgrade.
Can you migrate from Odoo Community to Odoo Enterprise?

Yes. We handle edition migration from Odoo Community to Enterprise including the data adjustments needed, Enterprise-specific module configuration, and training your team on the new Enterprise features.
What is Odoo cloud migration?

Odoo cloud migration is the process of moving your on-premise Odoo installation to a cloud hosting environment such as Odoo.sh, AWS, Google Cloud, or a managed VPS. It improves performance, enables remote access, provides automatic backups, and significantly improves security.
How do you ensure no data is lost during migration?

We take a full backup of your database and filestore before any migration work begins. All migration transformations are performed on a staging copy of your data never on live data. We produce reconciliation reports after migration to verify record counts and key values match between the source and migrated environments.
Why choose Creyox as your Odoo migration company?

Creyox brings hands-on experience across every Odoo migration scenario, version upgrades, data migrations, cloud migrations, and module porting. Our team is 100% in-house, assessment-first in our approach, and dedicated to zero data loss and minimal downtime.
What is included in your Odoo support services?

Our Odoo support services cover bug fixes, technical debugging, functional guidance, performance tuning, proactive maintenance, security audits, version upgrades, and custom enhancement requests all backed by a signed SLA agreement.
Do you provide 24/7 Odoo technical support?
No. We provide support during business hours, ensuring fast and reliable assistance when your team needs it most. Critical issues are handled on priority with defined SLA response times.
Do you support both Odoo Community and Enterprise editions?

Absolutely. Our team has deep experience in both Odoo Community and Odoo Enterprise editions, across versions 14, 15, 16, 17, and 18. We handle version-specific quirks and differences as a matter of course.
What's the difference between Odoo technical and functional support?

Odoo technical support deals with code-level issues debugging Python/XML errors, database problems, server failures, and API issues. Odoo functional support helps users with configurations, workflows, module settings, training, and process optimization with no coding required.
How do you handle urgent production issues?

Critical P1 incidents trigger immediate escalation to our senior engineers. We follow an incident response protocol that includes root cause isolation, rollback options, hotfix deployment, and post-incident review all within your contracted SLA window.
Can you take over support from another vendor?

Yes. We handle vendor transitions regularly. Our onboarding process includes a full audit of your existing Odoo setup, documentation of customizations, and knowledge transfer ensuring continuity without disruption to your operations.
What is Odoo development?

Odoo development refers to implementing, customising, and extending the Odoo platform for a specific business including custom module development, ERP configuration, third-party integrations, eCommerce setup, and mobile app development built on the Odoo framework.
How much does Odoo development cost?

Costs vary based on scope, the number of modules, level of customisation, integrations required, and complexity. We provide a detailed, transparent quote after our free discovery call. No hidden charges, ever.
Can you customise Odoo for my specific industry?

Yes. We've delivered Odoo custom development services across manufacturing, retail, trading, services, education, and healthcare. Every implementation is shaped around your industry's specific workflows and requirements.
Do you handle Odoo ERP implementation from scratch?
Absolutely. We manage the complete Odoo ERP development lifecycle from requirement analysis and solution design to development, data migration, user training, and post-launch support.
Can you migrate our existing ERP to Odoo?
Yes. We handle safe, structured migrations from older Odoo versions or other ERP platforms with full data integrity, preserved customisations, and minimal operational downtime.
Do you offer Odoo mobile app development?
Yes. We build Odoo mobile app solutions for field teams, delivery agents, sales reps, and customer-facing portals giving your team full Odoo access on any device.
How long does an Odoo development project take?
A standard Odoo ERP implementation takes 4–10 weeks depending on scope. Custom module development ranges from 1–6 weeks. We provide a clear timeline after the discovery phase.
Do you provide ongoing Odoo support after go-live?
Yes. We offer dedicated Odoo support and maintenance packages covering bug fixes, performance monitoring, version upgrades, and continuous optimisation so your system stays healthy long after launch.
What does Odoo consulting include?
Business process analysis, ERP strategy, requirements documentation, gap analysis, module selection, migration planning, change management, training, and long-term advisory.
Can you help if we're already using Odoo but not satisfied with it?
Yes. We audit your current setup, identify what's misconfigured or underused, and deliver a clear optimisation roadmap.
Do you support Odoo Community and Odoo Enterprise?
Yes and we advise honestly on which edition fits your budget and requirements, including long-term trade-offs.
Who should attend Odoo functional training?

Anyone who works with Odoo on a daily basis sales reps, accountants, HR officers, warehouse staff, and managers. The functional training is designed to help business users operate Odoo confidently without needing technical help.
What's the difference between functional and technical Odoo training?

Functional training focuses on using Odoo's built-in features for business operations. Technical training focuses on developing, customizing, and extending Odoo aimed at developers and IT professionals.
Can the training be customized for our company?
Absolutely. All our Odoo training programs are tailored to your specific modules, business processes, and team roles. We don't deliver off-the-shelf content.
Is Odoo online training as effective as in-person?
Yes. Our online sessions are fully live and interactive with shared environments, screen sharing, and real-time Q&A. Many clients prefer the flexibility of online delivery.
Do you provide training for the latest version of Odoo?

Yes. Our trainerFunctional training for a single department can take 1–2 days. A full end-to-end ERP training for a cross-functional team may span 1–2 wes stay current with every Odoo release and deliver training on the version you're using whether it's Odoo 16, 17, or the latest Community or Enterprise edition.
How long does an Odoo training program take?

It depends on the track and scope. Functional training for a single department can take 1–2 days. A full end-to-end ERP training for a cross-functional team may span 1–2 weeks. We'll recommend the right duration based on your needs.
Do you offer training for the Odoo Community edition?
Yes. We offer Odoo training services for both Community and Enterprise editions.
How long does it take to develop a mobile app?

Mobile app development timelines depend on the app’s complexity, features, integrations, and business requirements. Simpler applications can be developed relatively quickly, while enterprise-grade apps with advanced functionality, backend systems, and custom workflows require a more extensive development process. We follow an agile development approach with regular sprint updates, allowing clients to review progress, provide feedback, and stay involved throughout the project.
Which is better, Flutter or React Native for mobile app development?

Flutter offers superior UI consistency and slightly better performance for complex animations. React Native is ideal if your team already uses JavaScript and you want code sharing with a web app. Both are excellent for cross-platform mobile app development. We help you choose based on your specific project requirements.
Can you integrate the mobile app with our existing Odoo ERP?

Yes, this is one of Creyox's core specialties. Our Odoo mobile app development team can build a fully integrated mobile experience that reads and writes data to your Odoo instance in real time via Odoo's JSON-RPC or REST API. We support Odoo versions 14, 15, 16, and 17.
Do you provide post-launch mobile app maintenance?

Absolutely. Every Creyox mobile app development project includes a 3-month post-launch warranty and optional ongoing support packages covering OS update compatibility, performance monitoring, bug fixes, and feature enhancements.
What is enterprise mobile app development?

Enterprise mobile app development refers to building mobile applications for large organizations with complex requirements multi-user roles, offline capability, ERP integrations, advanced security (RBAC, SSO, MDM), and scalability for thousands of concurrent users. Creyox specializes in enterprise mobile solutions for companies in manufacturing, logistics, finance, and retail.
Do you build IoT mobile app development solutions?

Yes. Our IoT mobile app development services cover mobile interfaces for connected hardware from Bluetooth Low Energy (BLE) device control to MQTT-based industrial sensor dashboards. We've built IoT mobile apps for smart factories, healthcare devices, and connected consumer products.
Can you develop a mobile banking app?

Yes. Our mobile banking app development services are built with security-first architecture. We implement PCI-DSS compliance, biometric authentication, end-to-end encryption, and secure API gateways for all fintech mobile applications.
How quickly will I get a response?
We typically respond to all inquiries within 24 hours during business days. For urgent matters, please call us directly.
What services do you offer?
We offer ERP solutions, CRM systems, POS solutions, web development, and comprehensive Odoo services including implementation and customization.
Do you offer free consultations?
Yes, we offer a complimentary initial consultation to understand your needs and discuss how we can help your business.
Where are you located?
Our main office is located at 123 Business Street, Suite 100. However, we serve clients globally through remote services.
